title: Scalable Mobs
description: A survival data pack that allows players to change the scale of passive mobs for decorative purposes.
body:
This data pack allows players to change the scale of most passive mobs.

To use the data pack, rename a name tag in an anvil to "scale_x", where x is a number between 0.1 and 3.0. The scale value may have a tenths digit of precision. Examples: "scale_1.5", "scale_0.3", "scale_2".

Allowed mobs:
- Allay
- Armadillo
- Axolotl
- Bat
- Bee
- Camel
- Cat
- Chicken
- Cod
- Cow
- Dolphin
- Donkey
- Fox
- Frog
- Glow Squid
- Goat
- Horse
- Llama
- Mooshroom
- Mule
- Ocelot
- Panda
- Parrot
- Pig
- Polar Bear
- Pufferfish
- Rabbit
- Salmon
- Sheep
- Skeleton Horse
- Sniffer
- Snow Golem
- Squid
- Strider
- Tadpole
- Trader Llama
- Tropical Fish
- Turtle
- Wolf
- Happy Ghast (1.21.6+)
